mapper.select: select id, bill_id, owner_id, owner_name, pay_amount, pay_method, transaction_no, pay_time, status, community_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from community_payment_record where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update community_payment_record set bill_id = #{billId}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, pay_method = #{payMethod}, transaction_no = #{transactionNo}, pay_time = #{payTime}, status = #{status}, community_id = #{communityId}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: -- delete from community_payment_record where id = #{id} DELETE FROM community_payment_record WHERE id IN (${ids})
